basic_details.job_title: NHM Chandigarh Specialist Doctors Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: National Health Mission Chandigarh (NHM Chandigarh) Specialist Doctors (Dermatologist, Paediatrician) Notification 2026 has been released under Advertisement No. RKS/CH-45/2026/156 on the official website of National Health Mission Chandigarh. Vacancies have been announced through the NHM Chandigarh Specialist Doctors (Dermatologist, Paediatrician) Recruitment 2026 for eligible medical professionals.

qualification.details: Specialist (Dermatologist, Paediatrician): MBBS Degree with MS/MD/DNB/Diploma from recognized University in their respective field. Should be registered with State Medical Council or with Medical Council of India- New Delhi. Preferential: Experience in relevant field. CCC+ course on computer concepts plus for 120 hours.

salary_details.details: Specialist (Dermatologist, Paediatrician): Rs. 2,000/- per slot of two hours

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NHM Chandigarh Specialist Doctors recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is through a walk-in interview. Candidates need to report for registration between 9:30 AM and 10:30 AM on 16th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Specialist Doctor posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS Degree with MS/MD/DNB/Diploma from a recognized university in their respective field and be registered with the State Medical Council or Medical Council of India.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Specialist Doctor positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Specialist Doctor positions is up to 62 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Specialist Doctor posts?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 2,000/- per slot of two hours for the Specialist Doctor positions.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the NHM Chandigarh Specialist Doctors recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is through a walk-in interview. Candidates need to submit their Bio-Data and relevant documents at the time of the interview.

faq.question: Q6. What documents do I need to carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should bring their Bio-Data, self-attested copies of all certificates (from matriculation onwards), one recent passport-size photograph attested by a Gazetted Officer, and original certificates.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on a walk-in interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted in Chandigarh. The exact venue details are available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. Are there any preferential qualifications for the Specialist Doctor posts?
faq.answer: Yes, experience in the relevant field is considered preferential. Additionally, a CCC+ course on computer concepts for 120 hours is also preferred.
